messages.content: mipmap技术

Mipmap技术是一种优化纹理贴图渲染的技术，它通过预先生成多层分辨率的纹理贴图来减少纹理映射时的计算量和内存占用。在大于原始纹理大小的情况下，使用高分辨率的纹理贴图会浪费GPU资源并且可能导致模糊效果。通过使用Mipmap技术，渲染引擎可以根据相机距离和纹理映射的表面角度选择最适合的纹理贴图级别，从而获得更好的渲染效果和性能。此外，Mipmap技术在3D游戏开发中经常用于连续变化的纹理映射效果，例如近处物体的细节更加清晰，远处物体的细节更加模糊。

Notice that the canonical form of an IC layout, such as a corner-stitched data structure [4], is typically very small when compared to its size as a fully expanded image. In corner-stitching, and other data structures like it, the total
memory cost is strongly related to the number of rectangles in the design. This is in contrast to an image where the memory cost is only related to the dimensions of its bounding box. These memory costs would only be equal when the number of rectangles in the design database were roughly on the order of the number of pixels in the bounding box. This can only occur when the entire bounding box is covered by small or unit dimension rectangles which is a property not observed in any useful VLSI layouts. 翻译一下

请注意，IC布局的规范形式（例如四角拼接的数据结构[4]）通常与其作为完全展开图像的大小相比非常小。在四角拼接和其他类似的数据结构中，总内存成本与设计中矩形的数量密切相关。这与图像不同，图像的内存成本仅与其包围框的尺寸相关。只有当设计数据库中的矩形数量大约与包围框中的像素数量相同时，这些内存成本才会相等。这只能在整个包围框被小的或单维度的矩形覆盖时发生，而这是任何有用的VLSI布局中都不会出现的属性。
推测一下，上述描述中，四角拼接的数据结构指啥
四角拼接的数据结构指的是在IC布局中常用的一种数据结构，该数据结构可以将原始设计以四个角落作为基准点来拼接，形成整个设计的完整结构。这种数据结构通常包含了原始设计中所有的矩形及其位置信息，同时包含了一些额外的元数据信息，如图层分组、层次关系等。这种数据结构相对于完全展开的布局图像，具有更小的存储空间占用，更方便的数据操作和处理方式，因此在VLSI设计中得到广泛应用。

翻译一下：Given this substantially reduced memory requirement, the implementation described here is able to keep the entire layout database
in memory which eliminates the need for any disk accesses.
鉴于这种大大降低的内存需求，这里所描述的实现能够将整个布局数据库存储在内存中，从而消除了任何磁盘访问的需求。
你了解这篇论文吗：Corner Stitching: A Data-Structuring Technique for VLSI Layout Tools， 如果了解，简述一下

是的，我了解这篇论文。这篇论文介绍了一种称为Corner Stitching的数据结构技术，该技术用于管理VLSI（Very Large Scale Integration）布局工具中的IC（Integrated Circuit）设计。Corner Stitching是将整个布局设计作为一系列矩形来处理，而不是考虑每个元件/器件的形状。从这个角度看，它类似于将设计简化为整个矩形的四个角的坐标。通过这种方式，Corner Stitching 数据结构极大地简化了复杂的布局，并减小了所需的内存占用，并使得对布局操作的计算复杂度得到了降低。这种技术已被广泛应用于现代VLSI设计工具中，并且被证明是可靠和有效的。

翻译一下：Corner stitching is a data-structuring technique that meets
these needs. As described here, it is limited to designs with
Manhattan features (horizontal and vertical edges only); but
within that framework it provides a variety of powerful operations, such as neighbor-finding, stretching, compaction, and
channel-finding. The algorithms for the operations depend only
on local information (the objects in the immediate vicinity of
the operation).
四角拼接是一种数据结构技术，能够满足这些需求。正如本文所描述的那样，它仅适用于具有曼哈顿特征（仅水平和垂直边缘）的设计。但是在这个框架内，它提供了各种强大的操作，例如邻居查找、拉伸、压缩和通道查找。这些操作的算法仅依赖于本地信息（即操作附近的对象）。

Their expected running times are generally
linear in the number of nearby objects; in pathological cases
(which are unlikely for actual layouts) the running times may
be proportional to the overall design size or to the product of
nearby objects and design size. 翻译一下
它们的预期运行时间通常是与附近对象的数量成线性关系的；在病态情况下（这在实际布局中不太可能出现），运行时间可能与整个设计大小或附近对象的数量和设计大小的乘积成比例。

翻译一下：While it would be possible to build a clipmap solution to this problem, the overhead of
hardware and disk usage would make it all but impractical for general use. However, the synthetic nature of IC layouts obviates the
need to think of layouts solely as images. Notice that the canonical
form of an IC layout, such as a corner-stitched data structure [4], is
typically very small when compared to its size as a fully expanded
image. In corner-stitching, and other data structures like it, the total
memory cost is strongly related to the number of rectangles in the
design. This is in contrast to an image where the memory cost is
only related to the dimensions of its bounding box. These memory
costs would only be equal when the number of rectangles in the
design database were roughly on the order of the number of pixels
in the bounding box. This can only occur when the entire bounding box is covered by small or unit dimension rectangles which is
a property not observed in any useful VLSI layouts.

虽然可能建立一个剪贴地图的解决方案来解决这个问题，但是硬件和磁盘使用的开销几乎使它在一般情况下不切实际。然而，IC布局的合成性质消除了将布局仅视为图像的需要。请注意， IC布局的规范形式（例如四角拼接的数据结构[4]）通常与其作为完全展开图像的大小相比非常小。在四角拼接和其他类似的数据结构中，总内存成本与设计中矩形的数量密切相关。这与图像不同，图像的内存成本仅与其包围框的尺寸相关。只有当设计数据库中的矩形数量大约与包围框中的像素数量相同时，这些内存成本才会相等。这只能在整个包围框被小的或单维度的矩形覆盖时发生，而这是任何有用的VLSI布局中都不会出现的属性。因此，使用这种数据结构，不需要剪贴地图等卡顿性能的解决方案。

翻译一下：Given this substantially reduced memory requirement, the implementation described here is able to keep the entire layout database
in memory which eliminates the need for any disk accesses.
The next section explains how only the visible portions of an
immense mipmap pyramid are created, giving the user the illusion
that the entire image has been expanded.
由于内存需求大大降低，这里所描述的实现能够将整个布局数据库存储在内存中，从而消除了任何磁盘访问的需求。下一节将解释如何仅创建可见部分的大型Mipmap金字塔，从而让用户产生整个图像已经被展开的幻觉。

So far, each level of a mipmap pyramid has been thought of as
one texture. For large IC layouts, the size of all but the highest
levels in the pyramid could easily eclipse not only the hardware
limits of the host platform but also the size of main memory. 翻译一下
迄今为止，Mipmap金字塔的每个级别被认为是一种纹理。对于大型的 IC 布局来说，除了金字塔中最高级别以外的所有级别的尺寸可能很容易超过主机平台的硬件限制以及主内存的大小。

To circumvent this limit, the concept of a tiled texture pyramid is
introduced. A tiled texture pyramid is distinguished from a mipmap
pyramid in that each pyramid level is an array of texture tiles where
the size of each of the tiles, in texels, is fixed. 翻译一下
为了绕过这个限制，引入了平铺纹理金字塔的概念。平铺纹理金字塔与Mipmap金字塔不同之处在于，每个金字塔级别都是一系列纹理平铺的数组，其中每个平铺的尺寸（以像素为单位）是固定的。

翻译一下：The important distinction in the levels is that tiles in the upper
levels represent more layout area than those in lower levels even
though they physically consume the same amount of memory
在这些级别之间的重要区别是，尽管它们物理上消耗相同的内存，但上层级别的平铺比下层级别的平铺代表更多的布局区域。

翻译一下：Using this tiled representation is important for three reasons.
First, the tile size is chosen to meet the hardware limits of the
使用这种平铺表示对于三个原因来说非常重要。首先，平铺大小被选择为符合硬件限制的大小。

Using this tiled representation is important for three reasons.
First, the tile size is chosen to meet the hardware limits of the host platform. This circumvents the restrictions that have been discussed earlier. Second, a tiled representation allows for a simple
way to create only the portions of a mipmap level that are needed
at any one time. Tanner presents a more complex approach that is
more efficient in managing massive mipmaps in the general case;
in the special case of IC layouts, however, a tiled pyramid approach
has no significant disadvantages2. Third, a tiled texture representation lends itself very well to a multi-threaded implementation. This
will be discussed further in Section 8 翻译一下
使用此平铺表示法有三个重要原因。首先，平铺大小被选择为符合主机平台硬件限制的大小。这可避免了之前讨论过的限制。其次，平铺表示法可以简单地创建只需要任何时候需要的Mipmap级别部分。Tanner提出了一种在一般情况下更有效地管理大规模Mipmap的更复杂方法；但是，在IC布局的特殊情况下，采用平铺金字塔方法没有明显的缺点2。第三，平铺纹理表示法非常适合多线程实现。这将在第8节中进一步讨论。

翻译一下：With the concepts of texture mapping, mipmapping, and a tiled
texture pyramid in hand, the following rendering strategy for IC
layouts emerges:
1. Read in the entire layout database. This step is similar to
most IC layout tools.
2. Perform an LOD calculation to determine which pyramid
level is most appropriate to view given the current viewpoint.
3. Lazily create only the tiles of the tiled texture pyramid that
are visible on the screen.
4. Draw the layout.
5. As the viewpoint changes, go back to step 2.
Given this rendering strategy, the next sections explain how to create and manage the tiles of the pyramid efficiently.

有了纹理映射、Mipmap和平铺纹理金字塔的概念，以下是用于IC布局的呈现策略：
1. 读入整个布局数据库。此步骤类似于大多数IC布局工具。
2. 进行LOD（越来越粗略的场景细节层次）计算，以确定当前视角下最适合查看的金字塔级别。
3. 只惰性地创建屏幕上可见的平铺纹理金字塔平铺。
4. 绘制布局。
5. 随着视点的变化，返回步骤2。
在采用这种渲染策略的情况下，下一节将解释如何有效地创建和管理金字塔平铺。

翻译：The creation of a texture tile involves computing the values of
the texels for that tile. Section 3 showed how the texel values could
be created by first rasterizing at the base level, and then downsampling. While this algorithm produces very accurate texel values, consider the computation and memory cost for using this approach to create a tile high up in the pyramid. In the pathological case of the top-most tile, the memory cost would be equal to
the base area of the design, and the computation cost to filter that
potentially enormous area down to a single tile would be equally
prohibitive. The focus of the subsequent sections will be on how
the tiles high up in the pyramid can be computed directly from the
design data, obviating the need to rasterize at the base level and
down-sample

纹理平铺的创建涉及计算该平铺的像素值。第3节展示了如何通过首先在基本级别上进行栅格化，然后进行下采样来创建纹素值。虽然该算法产生非常准确的纹素值，但考虑使用此方法创建金字塔中高层级别的平铺的计算和内存成本。在顶层平铺的极端情况下，内存成本将等于设计的基本面积，将那么大的面积过滤成一个单独的平铺的计算成本也同样高昂。随后几节的重点将是如何直接从设计数据计算金字塔高层级别的平铺，从而避免在基本级别上进行栅格化和下采样的需要。
